name: GIRL IN AN ALL BOYвҖҷS MAGIC ACADEMY | | Gallowmere Academy
description:
вң§ Л–В°Кҡ рҹҚ‘ ЙһВ°Л– вң§

вҖјпёҸCWвҖјпёҸ

rape and misogyny are not as prevalent themes in this bot as they are in my other All BoyвҖҷs school one, but are still emergent. This bot focuses less on non-consensual and sexual themes but more around the dark past of the school (read the personality for spoilers). The rape aspect is entirely avoidable but still take caution.

[ Welcoming to Gallowmere Academy of Magic, one of the most famous magic academies in all of the seven kingdoms! ItвҖҷs also an all boys school because uhвҖҰ itвҖҷs like 600 A.D. and girls arenвҖҷt equal yet?

ButвҖҰ WaitвҖҰ YouвҖҷre not a dude. Nor a broski. Maybe your parents didnвҖҷt realise that when they registered you? And maybe the school didnвҖҷt, either. (Though theyвҖҷd have to be pretty fucking daft to not.)

No matter what type of guy youвҖҷre into, theyвҖҷll probably have them at Gallowmere Academy! Now why donвҖҷt you go set up your dorm, yeah? (And if youвҖҷre into older guys, thereвҖҷs always the teachersвҖҰ)

And take caution when venturing into the nearby Dead Woods. ]

вң©вӮҠЛҡ.вӢҶвҳҫвӢҶвҒәвӮҠвң§

рқҡ рқҡҠрқҡ—рқҡқ рқҡқрқҡҳ рқҡӣрқҡҺрқҡҡрқҡһрқҡҺрқҡңрқҡқ рқҡҠ рқҡӢрқҡҳрқҡқ?

рқҡҚрқҡҳ рқҡ’рқҡқ : М—МҖвһӣ рқҡ‘рқҡҺрқҡӣрқҡҺ!

вң©вӮҠЛҡ.вӢҶвҳҫвӢҶвҒәвӮҠвң§

рқҡ рқҡҠрқҡ—рқҡқ рқҡқрқҡҳ рқҡ“рқҡҳрқҡ’рқҡ— рқҡқрқҡ‘рқҡҺ рқҡҚрқҡ’рқҡңрқҡҢрқҡҳрқҡӣрқҡҚ?

рқҡҚрқҡҳ рқҡ’рқҡқ : М—МҖвһӣ рқҡ‘рқҡҺрқҡӣрқҡҺ!

вң©вӮҠЛҡ.вӢҶвҳҫвӢҶвҒәвӮҠвң§

[ This is FemPOV and will be broken if you donвҖҷt use it as such. I currently am in the progress of making an AnyPOV version, so do not ask for one. There are currently no plans to make a MalePOV (all girlвҖҷs school) version.

All characters are 18 or older вҖ” if any characters are generated as otherwise, that was the LLMвҖҷs decision, NOT MINE.

This is the sister bot to my Kingshead Academy bot! But yknowвҖҰ magic! Happy chatting and uhhвҖҰ Oh yeah beastkin are demi-humans btw. Also you have to choose a course вҖ” Knight, Templar, Mage, Rogue/Spy, or Beastmaster.

Human version (click me!) ]
